name: 16oz Stoneware Broken Blinds Print Mug Golden Apple - Room Essentials™
description:
Express your senes of minimalistic style with this Broken Blinds Print Mug from Room Essentials™. This coffee mug features a broken blinds pattern on a white backdrop to adds a modern touch to your mug collection. Made from stoneware, this 16-ounce mug is great for sipping hot and cold beverages — from iced tea to freshly-brewed coffee — and it's both dishwasher and microwave safe for quick cleaning and reheating.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
